title: WYKORZYSTANIE FILMÓW DO ROZPOWSZECHNIANIA INFORMACJI WŚRÓD OSÓB ODWIEDZAJĄCYCH FERMY LUB PRODUCENTÓW DROBIU
description: A practical guide for creating and using short informational and training videos to share scientific and technical knowledge with poultry producers and farm visitors. It outlines key steps including defining objectives, writing scripts, recording audio and video, editing footage, and distributing the final videos effectively.
